title: Lipid lowering — overclaim and not-supported
notes: Synthetic-but-realistic; controlled ground truth. VERIFY before publishing.
manuscript: At week 24, treatment with alirocumab reduced LDL cholesterol by 58% versus placebo.1 Alirocumab significantly reduced the rate of cardiovascular death.1 Alirocumab also improved renal function in patients with chronic kidney disease.2 These results were observed across subgroups.

goldClaims.originalText: At week 24, treatment with alirocumab reduced LDL cholesterol by 58% versus placebo.1
goldClaims.text: At week 24, treatment with alirocumab reduced LDL cholesterol by 58% versus placebo

goldClaims.originalText: Alirocumab significantly reduced the rate of cardiovascular death.1
goldClaims.text: Alirocumab significantly reduced the rate of cardiovascular death

goldClaims.originalText: Alirocumab also improved renal function in patients with chronic kidney disease.2
goldClaims.text: Alirocumab also improved renal function in patients with chronic kidney disease

goldNonClaims: These results were observed across subgroups.

1.name: ODYSSEY-LDL (Roe 2023)
1.text: At week 24, alirocumab reduced LDL cholesterol by a mean of 58% relative to placebo (p<0.001). For the composite of cardiovascular death, myocardial infarction, or stroke, a numerical reduction was observed (hazard ratio 0.85; 95% CI 0.72-1.01), but the difference was not statistically significant; cardiovascular death alone was not significantly reduced.

2.name: ODYSSEY safety appendix
2.text: Adverse events were balanced between groups. Injection-site reactions were more common with alirocumab. The safety analysis did not assess renal endpoints or kidney function.

goldVerdicts.claimText: At week 24, treatment with alirocumab reduced LDL cholesterol by 58% versus placebo
goldVerdicts.rationale: Ref states the 58% reduction with p<0.001 explicitly; claim does not exceed it.

goldVerdicts.claimText: Alirocumab significantly reduced the rate of cardiovascular death
goldVerdicts.rationale: Ref explicitly says cardiovascular death alone was NOT significantly reduced — direct negation of the significance assertion (rule 1).

goldVerdicts.claimText: Alirocumab also improved renal function in patients with chronic kidney disease
goldVerdicts.rationale: Ref states renal endpoints were not assessed — silent on the claim (rule 2).
